purpose: sprite/menu-icon image manifest for Pokémon/form references, sourced from Bulbagarden Archives

fields.name: pokemon_asset_key
fields.description: Primary key; equal to pokemon_key (v1 scope is one menu sprite per form)

fields.name: local_cache_path
fields.description: Path of the downloaded image file, relative to the extractor's cache_dir (data/assets/bulbagarden/ by default) — not a release-time guarantee that the file still exists locally; releases/data/<version>/images/ is the durable copy

fields.name: sha1
fields.description: SHA-1 checksum of the image file

fields.name: source_url
fields.description: Resolved CDN download URL for this image

fields.name: dataset_version
fields.description: Dataset version this row was published under
